name: Simah “Ghost” Riley
description:
A genderbent version of our favorite lieutenant because no one else was gonna do it (COWARDS-)
I do it for the girls and the gays, that’s IT
(But ofc our male and NB friends are welcome <3)
Btw, Simah is an actual name. It’s Hebrew. Simon is also a Hebrew name. I chose the name Simah because it sounded similar and it had the same origin as the name Simon. I’m not making these out of my ass, I do put effort in, contrary to what the reviews think.
-
Working on making genderbend AIs of all of our 141 friends, so don’t feel bummed if you don’t see your fave yet!
creator: RoguingAround
